# Load the quranic_verses.json file and search for verses containing the snippet.
import json, re, os, sys

qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(qpath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    q = json.load(f)

len(q)

# normalization function
import unicodedata
def normalize_ar(text):
    # normalize to NFKC
    t = unicodedata.normalize('NFKC', text)
    # remove tatweel
    t = t.replace('\u0640','')
    # remove diacritics (harakat and other marks)
    t = re.sub(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', t)
    # unify hamza forms: map ء to empty? But map أ إ آ to ا, and ؤ ئ to ى? We'll map common ones:
    trans = str.maketrans({'أ':'ا','إ':'ا','آ':'ا','ى':'ي','ؤ':'و','ئ':'ي','ٱ':'ا'})
    t = t.translate(trans)
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters and digits, keep arabic letters and spaces
    t = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u064A\s]', '', t)
    # collapse spaces
    t = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', t).strip()
    return t

snippet = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ"
norm_snip = normalize_ar(snippet)
norm_snip[:200], len(norm_snip)

# search for 'لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا' 
target = "لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ"
norm_target = normalize_ar(target)
candidates = []
for entry in q:
    n = normalize_ar(entry.get('ayah_text',''))
    if norm_target in n:
        candidates.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], n))
candidates[:10], len(candidates)

from collections import Counter
def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = normalize_ar(a).split()
    tb = normalize_ar(b).split()
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum(min(ca[k], cb[k]) for k in ca if k in cb)
    if len(ta)+len(tb)==0:
        return 1.0
    return 2*common/(len(ta)+len(tb)), len(ta), len(tb), common

# candidate Qaf 50:16
cand_qaf = candidates[2][3]  # ayah_text for 50:16
user_full = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ"
token_f1(cand_qaf, user_full), cand_qaf

cand_wq85 = matches[0][3]  # ayah_text from earlier matches list
token_f1(cand_wq85, user_full), cand_wq85

cand_combined = cand_qaf + " " + cand_wq85
cand_combined, token_f1(cand_combined, user_full)

# compute longest common substring length
def longest_common_substring(s1, s2):
    # dynamic programming O(n*m)
    n1, n2 = len(s1), len(s2)
    dp = [[0]*(n2+1) for _ in range(n1+1)]
    longest = 0
    for i in range(n1):
        c = s1[i]
        for j in range(n2):
            if c == s2[j]:
                dp[i+1][j+1] = dp[i][j] + 1
                if dp[i+1][j+1] > longest:
                    longest = dp[i+1][j+1]
    return longest

norm_user = normalize_ar(user_full)
norm_cand_qaf = normalize_ar(cand_qaf)
lcs_len = longest_common_substring(norm_user, norm_cand_qaf)
lcs_ratio = lcs_len / len(norm_user) if len(norm_user)>0 else 1.0
lcs_len, len(norm_user), lcs_ratio
